name: Crunch-Filled Medjools
description: Medjool dates filled with crunch and coated in milk, dark, or white chocolate.

name: Dubai-Style Medjools
description: Medjool dates filled with pistachio paste and shredded filo dough (kataifi), coated in milk, dark, or white chocolate.

name: Date & Nut Balls
description: Naturally sweet, soft bites made from premium dates blended with roasted nuts. No refined sugar or additives - just wholesome ingredients rolled into rich, satisfying little balls with an option of dessicated coconut coating. Perfect for a quick energy boost or a guilt-free treat with your chai.

name: Hazelnuts Chocolate Medjool
description: Premium Medjool dates filled with crunchy hazelnut chocolate. Naturally soft and caramel-sweet, paired with a rich nutty crunch and silky chocolate finish. A luxurious bite that's perfect for gifting, dessert platters, or an indulgent treat

name: Nougat
description: Soft chewy nougat with dried cranberries, fresh lemon and orange zest, and plenty of roasted hazelnuts, almonds, and pistachios. Sweet tangy and packed with real nuts in every bite

name: Caramel/Salted Caramel
description: Caramel or Salted Caramel candies with or without chocolate coating.

name: Twix Cups
description: Salted or Classic Caramel. Buttery biscuit, rich caramel, milk chocolate. Soft, crunchy, and oh-so-indulgent. Available with fillings like Hazelnut-Chocolate, Pistachio etc. too.

name: Dubai-Style Waffle Cones/Rolls/Bowls
description: Multiple Fillings available. Crispy waffle cones with creamy, flavorful fillings. Soft, crunchy, and completely homemade.

name: Cranberry Bliss Bars
description: Chewy cranberry bars with luscious cream cheese frosting — tart, sweet, and utterly creamy.

name: Almond Rocca
description: Crunchy, caramel-coated almonds layered in a rich, sweet base for a satisfyingly crisp bite. Homemade with care, it's the perfect nutty indulgence - sweet, crunchy, and utterly irresistible.

name: Pâte de Fruit (Fruit Jellies)
description: Handcrafted fruit jellies made from real fruit purée, gently cooked for a clean, vibrant taste. Soft, delicately set, and lightly coated in sugar. Available in a rotating selection of seasonal and classic flavours.

name: Fruit Cake Rusks
description: Buttery, rich Fruit Cake Rusks with a delicate, crunchy bite.

name: Orange Loaf Cake
description: Delicious, moist loaf Cake with a thin, crisp exterior. Can be frozen airtight for months without changing anything about it.

name: Spiced Cheddar Crackers
description: Bold cheddar. Light heat. Perfect crunch.

name: Cheddar Cheese Biscuits
description: Buttery, crispy-on-the-outside, tender-on-the-inside biscuits with bold cheddar flavor - homemade and delicious.

name: Honey Cheese & Garlic Twists
description: Crispy, handmade puff pastry with garlic, honey butter, and melted cheese - flaky, rich, and totally homemade.

name: Chocolate Chip Cookies
description: Golden-baked cookies loaded with rich chocolate chips in every bite. Crisp around the edges, soft and chewy in the center, and made with real butter for that classic bakery-style taste. Perfect for sharing.. or enjoying all to yourself.

name: Bottoms Up Chocolate Chip Minis
description: Bite-sized chocolate chip cookies baked until lightly golden, then finished with a thin layer of smooth chocolate underneath. Perfectly balanced in sweetness.
